otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism for up to 90 days
Passport must be valid for at least 30 days after your intended departure and have at least 2 blank pages
You may be asked to show proof of onward or return travel
sourceNote: gov.uk South Africa travel advice — visa-free visits for tourism up to 90 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/south-africa/entry-requirements)
